## Phase Completion Checklist

Before merging, confirm ALL items are complete:

```
□ CI (test + lint) is all green
□ All acceptance criteria verified
□ Backend deployed and responding
□ Frontend deployed and accessible
□ QA verified by Hermes (qa-passed label required)
□ Documentation updated (if needed)
□ No blocking issues or known bugs
```

**Important:** Hermes QA pass is required before merge. Add "qa-passed" label after Hermes confirms QA.
